input:
So I went to his house in the morning. He welcomed me heartily and asked what I wanted. I said: ‘I have come to tell you that I have embraced Islam and that I now believe in God and His Messenger, Muhammad.’ Furious, Abū Jahl slammed the door in my face, saying: ‘Confound you and what you have come here for.’” This incident acquires more significance when one realizes that ʿUmar’s mother was Abū Jahl’s own sister. That morning, ʿUmar also made the fact of his conversion known to Jamīl ibn Maʿmar, who made it his business to spread every piece of news around Makkah.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 11: Hope and Despair

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 11: Hope and Despair

characters.name: Umar ibn al-Khattab
characters.appearance: Early 40s, dark olive skin, muscular build, tall. Thick black beard with slight red tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain dark woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Strong confident expression, stern eyes.

characters.name: Abu Jahl (Amr ibn Hisham)
characters.appearance: Late 50s, dark skin, robust build, slight paunch. Thick black beard, slightly unkempt. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, ornate dark woolen cloak with gold trim, simple white head covering. Worn leather sandals. Fierce scowl, stern eyes.

characters.name: Jamil ibn Ma'mar
characters.appearance: Mid 30s, medium skin tone, athletic build, dark hair. Clean-shaven, wearing off-white cotton thobe, simple dark woolen cloak, plain white head covering. Worn leather sandals. Friendly smile, inquisitive eyes.

output.moral_lesson: Courage and conviction in the face of adversity are essential for spreading the message of Islam.
output.narrative_text: Umar went to Abu Jahl's house to announce his conversion to Islam. However, Abu Jahl, furious at the news, slammed the door in his face. Meanwhile, Umar also informed Jamil ibn Ma'mar about his decision.

compliance.notes: Abu Jahl's rejection of Islam is shown through his facial expression and slammed door, avoiding graphic violence. Umar and Jamil ibn Ma'mar are shown with full faces, conveying their emotions and actions.

output.image_prompt: Children's illustration. Early morning scene in a modest 7th century Makkah mud-brick home. Umar, a tall muscular Arab man with dark olive skin, thick black beard, and off-white thobe, standing at an open doorway with a determined expression. Abu Jahl, a robust man with dark skin, thick black beard, and ornate dark cloak, slamming the door, his face filled with anger. In the background, Jamil ibn Ma'mar, a dark-haired man with athletic build, smiling and looking at Umar with interest. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Earthy palette. No modern objects.
